description_long: This object consists of three squeezable tubes of lotion, each with a distinct, colorful design and clear branding. The tubes are made of a flexible, semi-glossy plastic material and are capped with black, screw-on lids at the bottom. The front of each tube features bold, modern typography with the product and brand names, as well as abstract, overlapping shapes in green, yellow, red, and brown. The back of the tubes displays product information, ingredients, and usage instructions in smaller text. The tubes are compact and portable, suitable for carrying in a bag or placing on a bathroom counter. The overall appearance is vibrant and contemporary, with a focus on both functionality and visual appeal.
description: Three colorful, squeezable lotion tubes with black screw-on caps and abstract graphic designs. Each tube features bold branding and product names on the front.
description_view_0: The back of the three lotion tubes is visible, showing product information, ingredients, and abstract colored shapes.
description_view_1: A side view of the tubes, revealing their slim profile and the way the colored graphics wrap around the sides.
description_view_2: The front of the tubes is shown, highlighting the brand 'EKOS', product names, and vibrant abstract graphics.
description_view_3: The opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the continuation of the colorful patterns.
